name: Commercial Officer
description: Manages quotations, monitors bidding status, and supports contract documentation and follow-ups.

name: Head of Department
description: Oversees trade-specific operations, reviews and approves WDRs, and ensures quality and compliance within the assigned trade section.

name: Super User
description: A high-level user with broad access across the system. Super Users can support multiple projects and trade teams, create and manage templates, checklists, and workflows, and configure shared master data. They serve as technical and operational support across departments.
